designNotes.aesthetic: The revision preserves the calm cream, botanical green, and rust editorial direction while improving contrast, rule definition, text sizing, and mobile rhythm. Large serif headlines remain the visual anchor, with a stronger light, dark, light section sequence and clearer practical copy.
designNotes.signatureMove: The Harborlight bloom is now integrated more closely with the opening composition. Mobile presents one complete central flower inside a taller frame, supported by two quieter stems rather than clipped flowers at both edges. Precise pointer devices retain the soft focus reveal, while touch and reduced motion experiences show the complete still artwork.
designNotes.rationale: Navigation, calls to action, and footer links now provide comfortable touch targets. Body copy, service descriptions, notes, and supporting text remain at readable sizes, while the studio headline has a more controlled mobile measure. The secondary hero action now has a visible underline and the darker rust improves small label contrast. No verified contact channel, service area, delivery terms, timing details, or portfolio asset was supplied. The revision therefore does not invent those facts or present a false inquiry mechanism. It uses one concise availability statement and turns the primary action into an honest preparation path. An authentic work photograph could not be added because no local image was provided and the technical boundary prohibits remote assets.
